values.description: Base URL of the Meetzy backend server
JWT access token — auto-populated by the Login with Google request test script
JWT refresh token — auto-populated by the Login with Google request test script
Logged-in user's UUID — auto-populated by the Login with Google request test script
Partner user UUID — set manually to test the Get Partner Info request
Active call room UUID — received in match:found WebSocket event
Admin JWT — paste from POST /admin/login response (data.token)
Login-mosaic entry UUID — auto-populated by the Create Mosaic Entry test script
